title: T-036 — SCR-07-02 Changeover Matrix Editor (heatmap + tabs)
prompt:
# T-036 — SCR-07-02 Changeover Matrix Editor

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-07-02, §6 D5
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/matrix-screens.jsx:12-245 (`pext_matrix_editor`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:473-635
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement /settings/planning/changeover-matrix page with Tab 1 (Default matrix N×N heatmap), Tab 2 (Per-line overrides list), Tab 3 (Review Requests queue), [Save & Publish], [Import CSV], [Export CSV], [View History] actions.

## Implementation contract
1. New route `apps/web/src/app/settings/planning/changeover-matrix/page.tsx` (Server Component) loads active matrix via T-018 GET endpoint.
2. Client component `MatrixEditor.tsx` with shadcn Tabs (3 tabs).
3. Heatmap: green <15min, yellow 15-45min, red >45min, BLOCKED (segregation_required) shown with [Request Review] button.
4. Click cell → opens matrix_cell_edit_modal (T-037).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/settings/planning/changeover-matrix/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixEditor.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixHeatmapCell.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/__tests__/MatrixEditor.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/matrix-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given seeded 16x16 matrix, when /settings/planning/changeover-matrix renders, then 256 cells render with heatmap colors per range and Tabs Default/Per-Line/Reviews are visible
2. Given the rendered editor, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/matrix-screens.jsx:12-245, then it has same Tab structure, same heatmap legend, same action buttons in same order, and same shadcn primitives (Tabs, Card, Button, Badge) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given a BLOCKED cell, when user (Planner) clicks it, then [Request Review] button appears in cell tooltip and clicking opens request_review_modal (T-041)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/MatrixEditor.test.tsx covering heatmap render + parity + BLOCKED cell flow
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test matrix/MatrixEditor'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow Planner to set segregation_required (server-side V-CM-04)
- Do not load all per-line overrides eagerly (use Tab 2 lazy)
- Do not skip RBAC at page level

pipeline_inputs.description: 3-tab matrix editor with heatmap (color ranges), per-line overrides tab, review requests tab, Save & Publish + Import/Export actions.
pipeline_inputs.details: shadcn Tabs (Default | Per-Line | Reviews). Heatmap uses CSS grid + Tailwind tokens (green/yellow/red). BLOCKED cells render [Request Review] (Planner) and editable (Admin). Click cell opens edit modal.
out_of_scope: Do not implement cell edit modal here (T-037)
Do not implement publish modal here (T-038)
Do not implement import modal here (T-039)
